LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT COLLABNET, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED IN PART. COURT TAKES THE ISSUE OF DETERMINING IF CONTRACT IS AMBIGUOUS UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL HAS FILED A SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL MAKES AN ORAL REQUEST THAT THE COURT WILL NOT CONSIDER THE SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION. COURT GRANTS THE REQUEST. COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT COUNSEL ARE TO MEET AND CONFER ON PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS; PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WILL THEN SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS TO SUBMIT TWO FORMS OF ORDER: ONE CONSISTENT WITH TENTATIVE RULING AND ONE RE CONTRACT BEING AMBIGUOUS. (302/PHA) JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
